# Cost / Effort Baseline — <project name>

PMBOK Planning / Monitoring artifact. Owned by `project-manager`.
Units: currency, person-hours, story-points — pick one and stick with
it. Record the unit in §1.

## 1. Basis

- **Unit of measure.** (currency / person-hours / story-points / …)
- **Estimation method.** (analogous / parametric / bottom-up /
  three-point). Cite the source of rates or parameters.
- **Assumptions and exclusions.** Anything explicitly not costed.

## 2. Estimates per WBS / milestone

| ID | WBS item or milestone | Estimate | Confidence (low / med / high) | Basis |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 3. Baseline

Baselined total and phasing. Do not edit once baselined — re-baseline
via a change log row.

| Baseline | Date set | Total | Phasing |
|---|---|---|---|
| B-0 | | | |

## 4. Forecast (current)

| Date | Actual to date | Remaining forecast | Total forecast | Variance vs. baseline |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## 5. Funding / allocation

For currency projects: tranche schedule. For effort projects: weekly
capacity allocation and where it is drawn from.
